tracks.meaning: a unit or standard used to determine the size, amount, or extent of something
the act of determining or calculating the size, quantity, or degree of something
a bar or unit of musical time containing a specific number of beats
a legislative act or statute passed by a government body
a method or instrument used to assess or evaluate a person's abilities or characteristics
a specified amount of a substance or liquid, often used in cooking or medicine
a degree or extent to which something is true or applicable
a metric or standard used to evaluate performance or progress
a stratum or layer of rock or mineral deposits
